name: cp_not_chain_defer
drl: rule NT when $a : E0() $b : E1(this before[0ms,150ms] $a) not E2(this after[0ms,100ms] $b) then end
comment: D-128 not-temporal RECON witness (2026-07-08): chain not E2(after $b). With the D-120 not-wall lifted in a scratch, the not firing DEFERRAL pervades — Seine fires a not that is satisfied SO FAR immediately, Drools defers until the clock proves the window closed (here engine 2 vs oracle 1, and firing[0] order differs). Not admission order (that was exists/D-127) — the window-close deferral (timer) + @expires-through-the-not inference are the prerequisite arcs. Population ~30 pct divergence (tools/fuzz_not_temporal.py); NOT a clean slab.
